description: Planned service and gas recharge of the Studio 1 air conditioning unit, which has been struggling to cool during the morning show. Work scheduled for Saturday outside broadcast hours. Rollback is to revert to the portable cooling units. Requested by Asha Gallegos.

Replace the ageing on-air playout PC in Studio 1 with a new workstation and migrate the playout software. Change limited to a maintenance window; rollback plan is to reconnect the existing PC. Requested by Sipho Ndaba.

Firmware upgrade on the Studio 2 digital mixing desk to fix intermittent channel dropouts during interviews. Scope limited to the desk; rollback is to flash the previous firmware version. Requested by Naledi Tau.
short_description: Firmware upgrade on Studio 2 mixing desk

description: Roll out two-factor authentication across all Kgosi Media Microsoft 365 accounts. Phased enrolment by department; rollback is to disable enforcement per user if issues arise. Requested by Themba Nkosi.
short_description: Enforce two-factor authentication on M365 accounts

description: Upgrade the office and studio wifi access points in the Braamfontein building to improve coverage for the streaming app on staff devices. Out-of-hours work; rollback is to re-enable the old access points. Requested by Dumisani Zwane.

Replace the two studio condenser microphones in Studio 1 that have developed a hum on the morning show. Quick swap during a maintenance window; rollback is to refit the existing mics. Requested by Asha Gallegos.

Migrate the website live stream to a higher-capacity server to reduce buffering during peak morning listening. Cutover during low-traffic hours; rollback is to repoint DNS to the existing stream server. Requested by Dumisani Zwane.
short_description: Migrate live stream to higher-capacity server

description: Install backup UPS units for the two main on-air studios to protect against load-shedding interruptions during broadcasts. Staged install; rollback is to remove the UPS and revert to direct supply. Requested by Tshepo Mokwena.
short_description: Install backup UPS units for on-air studios

description: Roll out the latest macOS security update to presenter laptops, including the MacBook Air used on the morning show. Tested on a pilot device first; rollback via Time Machine snapshot. Requested by Asha Gallegos.
short_description: Deploy macOS security update to presenter laptops

description: Patch the podcast publishing server that caused a delay in uploading show episodes. Apply update during off-peak hours; rollback is to restore the previous server image. Requested by Naledi Tau.
Acoustic treatment refresh in Studio 2 to reduce echo flagged during guest interviews. Panels installed out of hours; rollback is to remove the new panels. Requested by Sipho Ndaba.
Replace the failing newsroom network switch causing intermittent connectivity. Swap during a maintenance window; rollback is to refit the old switch. Requested by Karabo Maluleke.

Re-master and reload the station jingle pack into the playout system after listener complaints about loudness. Apply during a maintenance window; rollback is to reload the previous jingle pack. Requested by Naledi Tau.
short_description: Reload normalised jingle pack into playout

description: Repair the reception area door access reader that intermittently fails to admit staff before the early morning shift. Replace reader and re-enrol cards; rollback is to use the manual override. Requested by Fatima Patel.
Migrate shared show-prep files to the new Kgosi Media SharePoint site and decommission the old file share. Phased migration; rollback is to keep the old share read-only. Requested by Asha Gallegos.
